## Description
Add a celebration blast effect (confetti) to the terminal logo button for better visual feedback. This enhancement improves the overall user experience and matches the "neubrutalism" aesthetic of the site.

### Changes
- Installed `canvas-confetti` dependency.
- Updated `handleTerminal` logic in `App.jsx` to trigger a side blast from both sides.
- Added a colorful palette matching the existing ribbon colors.

### Screen (optional)
- [x] Tested on desktop
- [x] Checked mobile responsiveness
